creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169802
svn diff to science/libxc

Attached is patch to update science/libxc to 3.0.0. It has been tested to compile on 9 i386, 10 amd64, 10 i386, 11 amd64.

Please note: this patch does NOT work on 9/amd64. However, this is due to math/ldouble dependency which seems to have been added in 412349 by mat@.

I am open to suggestions how to overcome the issue.
